description: AlembicCore public API boundary policy. Exact stable and provisional exports are intentional; wildcard exports are migration-only.

closeout.description: Wave 3A closeout inventory. Manual categories override consumer-derived categories; remaining consumed transitional/wildcard exports are consumer-replace-first, and remaining unconsumed exports are no-consumer-deprecate-candidate.

facadeReadiness.description: Wave 3B readiness map for shared/config/types/candidate deep imports. This does not delete wildcard exports; it tells consumers which exact facade can replace each deep specifier.

./shared/*.reason: The shared exact facade re-exports current shared helpers, schemas, errors, test-mode, concurrency, workspace settings, markdown/diff utilities and tokens.

./infrastructure/config/*.reason: The config exact facade exposes ConfigLoader, namespaces, and direct path/default helpers used by consumers.

./types/*.reason: The types exact facade is type-only and re-exports workflow, snapshot and reactive evolution contracts.

./service/candidate/*.reason: The candidate exact facade re-exports candidate aggregation and similarity services without stabilizing the whole service tree.

@alembic/core/infrastructure/config/Conf.reason: Default and named ConfigLoader are available from the config facade.

@alembic/core/infrastructure/config/Defa.reason: Frequently used default constants are direct facade exports; namespace consumers can use ConfigDefaults.

@alembic/core/infrastructure/config/Path.reason: Frequently used path helpers are direct facade exports; namespace consumers can use ConfigPaths.

@alembic/core/service/candidate/Candidat.reason: Candidate aggregation is exported by the candidate facade.

@alembic/core/service/candidate/Similari.reason: Candidate similarity is exported by the candidate facade.

@alembic/core/shared/WorkspaceSettingsSt.reason: Workspace settings are shared runtime support, not a workspace-project facade contract yet.

@alembic/core/shared/concurrency.reason: Concurrency limiters are exported by the shared facade.

@alembic/core/shared/constants.reason: Shared constants are exported by the shared facade.

@alembic/core/shared/content-hash.reason: Content hash utility is exported by the shared facade.

@alembic/core/shared/developer-identity.reason: Developer identity helper is exported by the shared facade; downstream tests can mock the facade entrypoint.

@alembic/core/shared/diff-parser.reason: Diff parsing helpers are exported by the shared facade.

@alembic/core/shared/errors/BaseError.reason: Error classes are exported through the shared errors index and shared facade.

@alembic/core/shared/errors/index.reason: Error classes are exported through the shared facade.

@alembic/core/shared/folder-names.reason: Folder names are already part of the stable workspace facade.

@alembic/core/shared/isOwnDevRepo.reason: Development repository helpers remain shared support and are exported by the shared facade.

@alembic/core/shared/markdown-utils.reason: Markdown utilities are exported by the shared facade.

@alembic/core/shared/schemas/common.reason: Common schemas are exported by the shared schema index and shared facade.

@alembic/core/shared/schemas/config.reason: Config schemas are exported by the shared schema index and shared facade.

@alembic/core/shared/similarity.reason: Similarity helpers are already stabilized on the search facade.

@alembic/core/shared/test-mode.reason: Test-mode helpers are exported by the shared facade; downstream tests can mock the facade entrypoint.

@alembic/core/shared/token-utils.reason: Token utilities are exported by the shared facade.

@alembic/core/types/reactive-evolution.reason: Reactive evolution contracts are type-only exports from the types facade.

@alembic/core/types/snapshot-views.reason: Snapshot view contracts are type-only exports from the types facade.

@alembic/core/types/workflows.reason: Workflow contracts are type-only exports from the types facade; Wave 3B-Core-2 keeps these as type-only facade exports.
